Effect version: 4.0.0

/.src/emptyArgs.ts(5,24): suggestion TS377013: This pipe call contains no arguments. effect(unnecessaryPipe)
/.src/emptyArgs.ts(8,24): suggestion TS377013: This pipe call contains no arguments. effect(unnecessaryPipe)


==== /.src/emptyArgs.ts (2 errors) ====
    import * as Effect from "effect/Effect"
    import { pipe } from "effect/Function"
    
    // Pipe with single value (no transformations)
    export const result1 = pipe(Effect.succeed(1))
                           ~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~
!!! suggestion TS377013: This pipe call contains no arguments. effect(unnecessaryPipe)
    
    // Pipeable with no args
    export const result2 = Effect.succeed(1).pipe()
                           ~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~
!!! suggestion TS377013: This pipe call contains no arguments. effect(unnecessaryPipe)
